name: Walk The Light
short_description: A unique puzzle game where you control a mysterious light source to help Charlie escape the caverns he's been trapped in. Use an assortment of light shapes to tackle each puzzle set before you! Overcome traps and pits to reach the exit of each stage! Available on Mac and Windows.
detailed_description:
Meet Charlie: A brave electrician who is trapped in a treacherous cavern. His only chance of escape is with the help of a curious light that guides him along his journey.

Navigate over 60 puzzles using one of a kind problem solving skills. Illuminate objects in the environment to help Charlie reach the end of each stage. Think outside the box to unravel the mysteries before you and light the path to freedom.



  • A vast array of light shapes at your disposal
  • Each shape acts as a tool for unique situations
  • Control the light and interact with doors and switches
  • Avoid traps like lasers and pits
  • Use teleporters to reach inaccessible locations

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Japanese, Simplified Chinese
